script: echo '=== Cameron manifest (known working) ==='; find /home -name manifest.json -path '*cameron*' 2>/dev/null | head -3; for f in $(sudo find /home/cameron -name manifest.json 2>/dev/null; sudo find /home/azureuser/cameron-teams-app -name manifest.json 2>/dev/null); do echo "--- $f ---"; sudo cat "$f" 2>/dev/null; done; echo; echo '=== Jose manifest ==='; for f in $(sudo find /home/jose -name manifest.json 2>/dev/null); do echo "--- $f ---"; sudo cat "$f" 2>/dev/null; done; echo; echo '=== Aixa manifest (known working, Yoo deployed) ==='; sudo find / -name 'manifest.json' -path '*aixa*' 2>/dev/null | head -3 | while read f; do echo "--- $f ---"; sudo cat "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
